data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that substitute employees can attend, but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that 'anyone from the company can attend', there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided that demonstrate this capability. The absence of evidence showing how substitutes are managed or allowed to attend leads to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of how substitute employees are managed or allowed to attend.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for substitute employee attendance
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls that verify the attendance of substitute employees.
